summary: Tested Reception page client search feature and badges for walk-in bookings. Fixed 2 backend bugs: 1) NameError 'service_id' not defined in booking creation, 2) AttributeError when client_email is None in search_clients. All features working correctly after fixes.

fixed.issue: NameError: name 'service_id' is not defined - should be 'booking.service_id'
AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'strip' - client_email/phone can be None

issues: Badges 'Recepcion' and 'Pago en negocio' not shown in card view, only in detail modal - minor UX inconsistency

passed_tests: Search client results include name, phone, email fields - PASSED
Reception page loads with client search input - PASSED
Typing in search input shows dropdown with matching clients - PASSED
Clicking a client result auto-fills name, phone, email fields - PASSED
Reception page 'Citas de hoy' shows 'Recepcion' and 'Pago en negocio' badges - PASSED
Dashboard booking detail modal shows 'Recepcion' and 'Pago en negocio' badges - PASSED
Create walk-in booking from reception includes booked_by='business' field - PASSED
Reception page back button navigates to dashboard - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed 2 bugs in /app/backend/routers/bookings.py that were causing 500 errors
The booked_by field is correctly set to 'business' for new walk-in bookings created from reception
Badges appear in Reception page 'Citas de hoy' panel and Dashboard detail modal, but not in AgendaTimeline card view (minor UX inconsistency)
seed_data_creation: Created test walk-in bookings: TEST_NewWalkIn_12668, TEST_WalkIn_API_Test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested client search endpoint and booked_by field for reception bookings. Fixed 2 backend bugs. All features working. Badges show in Reception page and Dashboard detail modal. The AgendaTimeline component on dashboard doesn't show badges in card view (only in detail modal when clicking a booking).

bug_fix_details.issue: 500 error when creating booking from reception
bug_fix_details.root_cause: Line 462 used undefined variable 'service_id' instead of 'booking.service_id'
bug_fix_details.verification: Booking creation from reception now works correctly

bug_fix_details.root_cause: client_email/phone fields can be None, and calling .strip() on None causes AttributeError
bug_fix_details.verification: Client search endpoint now returns results correctly
